expected_output: Mujhe apne code aur architecture ke bare mein kuchh jaankari hai. Mere paas tsconfig.json aur package.json jaise configs bhi hain, jo mujhe apne development environment ko configure karne mein madad karte hain. Mujhe apne target roles ke bare mein bhi jaankari hai, jo ki Amazon, Microsoft, aur Google hain.
